skills.name: Shovel Slam
skills.description: Deal dice damage to a single hero.

skills.name: Trap
skills.description: Gain dice block. Retaliate: on first hit while block is active deal 3 damage to attacker and apply 1 Bleed. Consumed after one trigger.

skills.name: Turret
skills.description: If no Turret is alive spawn a new Turret with HP equal to dice result. Turret acts starting next turn.
